highlighted_projects.description: Built an AI Assistant that utilizes RAG pipeline with custom code chunking, sentence transformer embeddings, vector indexing, and LLM inference to answers questions from custom large C++ codebases using strict citation rules.
highlighted_projects.name: Codebase RAG Assistant

highlighted_projects.description: Built a modular Agentic System for analyzing data across multiple domains like finance, research and policy using a shared core architecture of planning, retrieval analysis and reporting agents.
highlighted_projects.name: Domain Intelligence Agent

jarvis_projects.description: Developed a Cluster Monitoring Agent that allows the linux administrator to track hardware information and resource usage across multiple nodes in a cluster using Bash scripting, PostgreSQL, Docker and Crontab to automatically gather usage statistics.
jarvis_projects.name: Cluster Monitor

name: Yash Mehrotra

professional_experience.description: Developed production-grade infrastructure tooling and data pipeline solutions across Linux, PostgreSQL, and Docker environments using Bash scripting and Agile practices.
professional_experience.title: ML Engineer

professional_experience.description: Built and shipped multi-platform, multiplayer, commercial titles owning systems development, performance optimization, and platform support.

summary: ML engineer with a diploma in Artificial Intelligence with Machine Learning (Humber College, 2025) and 4+ years of professional software engineering experience. Built LLM-powered applications, RAG pipelines, and agentic workflows by integrating LLM APIs, designing retrieval architectures, and building evaluation frameworks for generative AI outputs. Comfortable working across technical and non-technical teams, communicating AI concepts clearly, and delivering practical solutions to real problems.
